title: Better Armor and Tools
description: A retexture of all armor pieces and all tools
body:
Retextures all Tools and armor, this took a lot of time so i hope you like it.
Textures that have been changed:
Neterite Tools and Armor
Diamond Tools
Gold Tools
Iron Tools
Bow and Its pulling stages
Wooden tools
